fields.name: sow_number
fields.description: The unique SOW identifier or reference number (e.g., "SOW-2025-007", "SOW #3")

fields.name: sow_title
fields.description: Descriptive title of the statement of work

fields.name: effective_date
fields.description: The date the SOW becomes effective, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: end_date
fields.description: The date the SOW terminates or the project is expected to complete, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: amendment_number
fields.description: If this is an amendment to an existing SOW, the amendment number as integer (null if original)

fields.name: client_name
fields.description: Full legal name of the client organization

fields.name: client_contact
fields.description: Name of the primary client contact person (project manager, sponsor, or signatory)

fields.name: client_po_number
fields.description: Client's Purchase Order number referenced in the SOW (null if not present)

fields.name: vendor_name
fields.description: Full legal name of the vendor / service provider organization

fields.name: vendor_contact
fields.description: Name of the primary vendor contact person (project manager or account manager)

fields.name: project_description
fields.description: Brief description of the project or engagement scope (up to 300 characters)

fields.name: deliverables
fields.description: Array of deliverable objects. Each object must contain:

fields.name: name
fields.description: Short name of the deliverable

fields.name: description
fields.description: Brief description of the deliverable (up to 150 chars)

fields.name: due_date
fields.description: Due date in format YYYY-MM-DD (null if not specified for this deliverable)

fields.name: pricing_model
fields.description: The pricing structure. One of: Fixed | T&M | Retainer | Milestone | Other

fields.name: total_contract_value
fields.description: Total value of the SOW as decimal (null if T&M with no cap, or retainer with no stated total)

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency code (e.g., "USD", "EUR", "GBP")

fields.name: payment_terms
fields.description: Payment terms as stated (e.g., "Net 30", "50% upfront / 50% on completion", "Monthly in arrears")

fields.name: payment_schedule
fields.description: Description of the payment schedule or milestones for billing (up to 200 chars)

fields.name: acceptance_criteria_described
fields.description: Boolean — true if the SOW contains defined acceptance criteria for deliverables

fields.name: change_order_process_described
fields.description: Boolean — true if the SOW describes a change order or change control process

fields.name: ip_ownership
fields.description: Who owns intellectual property created under this SOW. One of: Client | Vendor | Joint | null

fields.name: governing_law
fields.description: The state or jurisdiction whose laws govern the SOW (e.g., "CA", "NY", "DE")

sections.title: Dates And Terms
sections.description: Dates And Terms fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Document Details
sections.description: Document Details fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Financials
sections.description: Financials fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Parties
sections.description: Parties fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Risk And Compliance
sections.description: Risk And Compliance fields extracted from the document.

completeness_checklist.description: All required fields are present or explicitly null with low confidence when absent.
Each declared section was reviewed for extractable evidence.
Object array fields use their item_schema for consistent nested extraction.
